Package nonprofitbookkeeping.panels

Class GrantsPanel.Grant

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.panels.GrantsPanel.Grant
Enclosing class:
GrantsPanel
public static class GrantsPanel.Grant extends Object
Donor-like model class representing a Grant. In a full system, this would likely be a more robust domain model.
